scripts.setup: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n be,fe -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:aipr: npm run generate --prefix backend && npx pnpm@9 install --dir backend/aipr && npx pnpm@9 install --dir frontend/aipr
scripts.build:aipr: npx pnpm@9 --dir backend/aipr build && npx pnpm@9 --dir frontend/aipr build
scripts.lint:aipr: npx pnpm@9 --dir backend/aipr lint && npx pnpm@9 --dir frontend/aipr lint
scripts.build:all: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.format: npm run format --prefix backend && npm run format --prefix frontend
